message:
🐛 Fix mission steps not loading + add saved mission detail modal (#1584)

- Implement on-demand step loading: when a mission card is clicked in the
  browser, fetch the full JSON from /api/missions/file to populate steps,
  uninstall, upgrade, and troubleshooting sections (previously showed
  "No install steps available" for all missions)
- Add detail modal for saved missions in the AI Missions sidebar: clicking
  a saved mission card opens MissionDetailView in a modal overlay with
  tabbed Install/Uninstall/Upgrade/Troubleshooting sections
- Works in both normal sidebar and fullscreen modes
- Add importLabel prop to MissionDetailView for context-appropriate button
  text ("Run" for saved missions, "Import" for browser)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
